grace_period.source_quote:
b) thirty days for any other installment modes (wherever applicable) 
c) thirty days for renewal.

free_look_period.source_quote:
You/the insured shall be allowed a period of thirty days from date of receipt of the Policy document to review the 
terms and conditions of the Policy

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote:
Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date 
shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be 
excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy 
with us.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
3. Specific Waiting Period: (Code- Excl02) 
a) Expenses related to the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded 
until the expiry of 12 months of continuous coverage

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred up to 60 (Sixty) days prior to Hospitalization on 
disease/illness/injury sustained

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Post Hospitalization Medical Expenses incurred during period up to 90(Ninety) days after Hospitalization on 
disease/illness/injury sustained

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (IFFCO Tokio family health insurance covers 380+ day care surgeries)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 8,000+ Network Hospitals ('Why Choose IFFCO-TOKIO' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: The following Co-pay options are available: 10%, 20% or 25% under the product.

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: 1(b)below will be payable according to actual expenses without any room rent expenses capping limits. b) In respect of sum insured less than Rs.5(five) lakh

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: refund proportionate premium for unexpired policy period, if the term of policy upto one year

ayush_coverage.source_quote:
AYUSH expenses including pre-hospitalization and post hospitalization expenses up to the limit of the Sum 
Insured of the insured person per policy period.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Hospitalization expenses of person donating an organ during the course of organ transplant subject to the above sub-limits applicable to the insured person and within the extended sum insured (if applicable) of the insured person.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Reinstatement of Basic Sum insured: After the occurrence of a claim under the policy, the basic sum insured under the policy will be reinstated by the amount of claim so that the full basic sum insured is available for the policy period subject to the following: a) Reinstatement of Basic Sum

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization if Medically Necessary up to a maximum aggregate sub-limit of 20% (twenty percent) of the Sum Insured. Note 1: 1.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: Extension of policy period :In case the insured person(s) who is/are covered under ‘Health Protector Policy’ has/have to go abroad for a minimum of 30(thirty) days and accordingly he/she/they buy a Travel insurance policy from IFFCO-Tokio General Insurance Co. Ltd.

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: health check-up: Insured person(s) shall be entitled to undergo a periodic medical checkup upon renewal of the policy. This benefit is dependent on the sum insured of the policy.

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: If the insured person(s) is/are diagnosed during the period of insurance as suffering from a critical illness as defined under the policy, we shall reimburse medically necessary and reasonable and customary charges incurred on expenses as listed under ‘’WHAT IS COVERED “up to an additional sum

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless facility 
It means a facility extended by us to Insured person where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by 
insured person(s)

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote:
subject to a maximum of 100% (one hundred percent) of 
basic sum insured of the expiring policy.

geographic_coverage.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims shall 
be payable in Indian currency.

room_rent_capping.value: No cap for sum insured Rs.5 lakhs and above; for sum insured below Rs.5 lakhs, 1.75% of SI per day in class A cities and 1.50% in other cities, whichever is less
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent Expenses: a) In respect of sum insured of Rs. 5(five) lakhs and above (excluding the higher sum insured for critical illness but including cumulative bonus), the room-rent expenses as mentioned in 1(b)below will be payable according to actual expenses without any room rent expenses

maternity_coverage.source_quote:
8. Maternity Expenses (Code - Excl 18): 
i) 
Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote:
The Cumulative Bonus shall accrue at 25% (twenty-five percent) of the basic sum insured for the first 
claim-free renewal
